spec.description: Django metrics dashboard using django-prometheus metrics exporter

spec.title: Number of Requests by Processing Time

spec.expr: topk(20, (1 - (sum(max_over_time(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_bucket{app=~"^$application$",le="$threshold"}[$__range]) / ignoring(le) max_over_time(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_count{app=~"^$application$"}[$__range])) by (method, view) / count(present_over_time(django_http_requests_latency_seconds_by_view_method_count{app=~"^$application$"}[$__range])) by (method, view))) > 0.0099)

spec.title: Django
